caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, wearing a grey wig styled in a high, pointed peak, glasses, headphones, a white shirt with a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He is positioned in front of a black microphone. In the background, several framed photographs and clothing items, including shirts from the brand "LEE," are displayed on a wall. Each frame features an on-screen logo that reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST." As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expressions while speaking. He appears to be mid-conversation, with his mouth opening and closing and his eyes occasionally glancing slightly to the side. The camera angle and lighting remain consistent throughout, focusing on the man from the chest up against the backdrop of the studio's decor.
